ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the dataset */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the dataset */,
  "dataset_title" TEXT /* Title of the dataset */,
  "dataset_issued" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was issued */,
  "dataset_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last modified */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "info_url" TEXT /* URL to additional information about the dataset */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the dataset's time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the dataset's time period */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the dataset */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Current version of the dataset */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the dataset is active */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset has been accessed */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset has been downloaded */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the dataset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for better search and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES dataset_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the publisher */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the publisher is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_title" TEXT /* Title of the file */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL to download the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "file_created" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "file_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last modified */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "licence" TEXT /* Licensing information for the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been accessed */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been downloaded */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_licence FOREIGN KEY ("licence") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_format FOREIGN KEY ("file_format") REFERENCES file_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., publisher, data analyst, public) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the license */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the license is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the license was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the license was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the file format (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file format */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the file format is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., publisher, data analyst, public) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Historical Records, Contract Disclosures) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
